title: PreMergeReviewResult
description: Output contract for pre-merge-review skill. Both local and CI consumers MUST parse this format.

policy_version.description: SemVer from VERSION file at time of check

policy_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the security-policies repo used. Required so local/CI mismatches can be diagnosed.

verdict.description: pass = no concerns; advisory = review recommended, merge allowed with explicit confirmation; block = do not merge

context.description: Execution context — affects how the verdict is acted upon downstream

location.description: file:line when possible, else 'diff' or file path alone

description.description: Human-readable explanation in Korean (team language) or English

source.description: Which check produced this finding. Deterministic findings cannot be downgraded by LLM.

confidence.description: Required for LLM findings, optional for deterministic

summary.description: Natural-language summary for human readers (used by local /git-pull display and Slack notifications)

next_action_hint.description: Suggested next step for the user, e.g. 'git merge --ff-only FETCH_HEAD' or 'review .github/workflows/deploy.yml'
